content:
I just started playing yesterday and joined the dc server. I read the guides and got overwhelmed lol so I just went on and YOLO'ed the gameplay. I mainly pulled Aequor since I enjoyed the gameplay the most. I'm currently still in Chap 2 and depleted all my pulls on Saya since everyone recommended her (I lost twice ffs). But now, idk how to build my teams further and which charas to save for in the future. I still got 100 pure cores and idk which to dupe lol.

I badly need help guys, I'm so bad at this T_T

Hey there : )

You will eventually want 5 teams so I recommand pulling some ultra to get familiar with their mechanic.

For now, Saya-Leigh-Celeste-Goliath should work and you will have opportunitues to fine-tune the team later : )
Also, Corposant will rerun very soon. If you do enjoy Saya ( do check if the shuffle gameplay suits you ) I would highly recommand her.
Getting your hands on Thaïs would help too but I wouldn't use selectors yet
I could also get Aurita and Erica rn, I just noticed they were free as well. Will those 2 change your recommended starting line-up?
( You can luck into Thaïs by pulling standard caro )

Aurita works well with Saya indeed. Erica is very versatile with that added bonus that she won't step on other ultra's toes.
I don't think she's that usefull with Saya, unless you get Cassiah and really want to play caro-ultra
uhhmmm
Help...? lmao
Now I'm even more confused T_T

The RNG god is with you 😄

So yeah. Here's a first team you can use : Saya-Thaïs-Aurita-Celeste.
And replace Celeste with Corposant when you can ( borrow her from assist )
That should easily carry you through the first chapters
You are a savior, my guy/gal. I truly appreaciate the guidance

About the guides : maybe don't overthink but remember to check up Cheri's handbook when you have a doubt about a specific awakener or WoD.
And do claim the gift codes.
I already did, thanks

I recommend sticking in 1 realms rather than pulling many realm early in the game (blue) . This game maybe look like f2p friendly. But it is not. You need a lot of dupe to beat harder boss. 

Also, if you can get Goliath to e2 and caucus to e3. You can start enter wheel jail. Only pull limited character. Use any pure... (I forgot it's name) to pull wheel. Goliath wheel to e12. Best dps wheel.

Sure, the first story mode chapters can be rolled through with a single realm. But that won't necessary last.
And solo caro is not that easy to pull off either u.u

Plus, only getting awakeners from the limited banners will make it hard to gather a whole 5 teams for D-zone. Might as well get used to several mechanics early and choose your main I say.

But then again, to each their own way to approach gacha : )
Since you recommend ultra to new player, I will not read any of your writing. Good day.

<@454896348475686912> here is a post from someone who cleared arc one with standard team (tulu is optional) 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1356486735764258856

Hey! I checked it out and it seems pretty good. I've been running the team Alya recommended me and it seems to run pretty good, having fun with the gameplay although I don't understand 100% of it. 

I'll check out this team comp, thanks!

Well, feel free to ask more details.
Did you get Saya's copy exhalt and how gynoesium work ? And how Thaïs gives her a boost ?
Let me be honest with you, I literally went to gemini and asked how the mechanics worked so I can better play the comp. I got the gist of it, but applying it in-game is the really hard part

😄
Honesty is always appreciated ^^

I adder spoiler banner for lisibility, can take them off

First off, about caro :
|| A caro team generates a healing pool at the start of each round. The lower your health, the more healing you gather.
> Saya adds an effect to the pool : whenever you use it to heal, she appkies corruption to all enemies ( more on that below ) ||

|| You can spend this healing pool at any time.
> Saya changes this rule and that pool is afflicted with to a 3-turn cooldown. ||

In adition, caro also generate embryos.
||Your caro awakener consume these embryo cards to give various power-ups to their exalts ( in the devour section of the exalt ).
> Thaïs can enhance these embryo cards to make them enhance the exalt twice ||

If you're swimming in these babies, you can also actively spend these embryos to give 30 aliemus 1 awakener
||> Thaïs can change that to 45 when you rouse her and use posses||

These red cards appear at the start of turn ||when your "embryo fusion" reaches 100.
> Saya chages that rule and the cap becomes 200||

So ... Thaïs good, Saya bad ?
||Well, it's certainly a drawback but Saya also comes with a powerful damage-booster called corrosion.||

||Whenever an enemy bears corrosion and is attacked ( direct awakener attack or tentacles ), corrosion is also depleted by the same amount and the enely takes 300 % more damage.
> So if you strike a corroded enemy for 500 damage, they will actually suffer 2 000 damage ! ( given they have enough corrosion applied ).||

Other kind of damage also trigger corrosion but with a much lower efficiency.

And that is where Aurita comes in : ||she specialises in direct burst and tentacle attacks, which do trigger corrosion.||

Finally, Corposant acts as a sustain composent in that team with a twist.
||Saya's main corruption dealer is her shuffle card. Note that her shuffe doesn't discard embryos.
And it so happens that corposant's main skill is expensive but get cheaper the more it's discarded.||

As for gynoecium, it's another way to make her exalt great besides embryos : ||Saya's exalt copies skill cards from a teammate and chokes to deck full of them ( though these copies are destroyed when used or discarded ).||
||When you cast the exalt with an embryo, she brings the cost of two basic attack or defense card to 0
> If she eats one of Thaïs' baby, that's 4 cards||
Gynoecium goes a tad further || : each stack used brings the cost of *any* card she just copied to 0||

As for aequor, it's pretty straightforward || : each turn gives you an additionnal by default. If you change stance, instead of popping a new appendage you use the current ones to either deal more damage or shield your team. ||
Here's what's interesting about the red stance : || the tentacles attack mode means every *hit* on the enely triggers a tentacle attack. Which can also trigger corruption. So lots of hits are preferable to big hits with aequor. ||
<@454896348475686912> Any better ? Want more specific detail ? Was this all too stuffy ?
Basically, just spam Saya's ult to copy Corpo's deck or Aurita's and don't forget to use the shuffle at the start of the round so you still have some arithmetica to deal damage after that.

How you guy even clear this? It feel too much for , my team no problem in arc 2 but helpless again p drive. 

What wheel you guys used? Was the flare wheel work?
I guess I can use this team now, til I get Aurita

You can but then remember : Sanga's ult revolves around stacking shield in a single turn.
So you'll want to :
- Rouse Saya to unlock the aliemus generation
- Build up both Saya's and Sanga's ults
- In the same turn : When you're ready, dip the boss' behind in corrosion + unleash Saya and then unleash Sanga's

This is one way to play it anyways.
And I would keep Murphy out of it in case anything goes awry.
Honestly I think there's better to be done, but you'll get to decide for yourself over time.
Wheel of Destiny " Memory spiral " might help keep the extra shield for later ( a portion of it, rather ) so overshielding doesn't feel too much like a waste.

can use 1 char dupe on thais to get her e2, then save the wod dupes and the last one for later, maybe pollux if u wanna dupe him up. are the char and wod perm selectors just standard selectors or are they like including limited as well? if its limited save it for now too
Just the original standard chars, ty for the advice :D
You can just get the standard chars you’re missing from a certain realm if you’re in wheel jail pulling for blades titan +12

- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
Also can check out the handbook for beginners guide
will do, thank youuu :DD
get another copy of gelot when she reruns, then run gelot aigis clem horla
thats the strongest team you have rn
idk if you have thais
I do not have Thais unfortunately I put her in that pick 4 banner but couldnt pull her
Saya seemed like a good choice instead of Clem as well. Corruption seems nuts, but maybe Clem's STR gain just scales better
saya is hard to use with gelot because all her power is in the 0 cost, but using the 0 cost makes you discard all the flails you have in hand
its not impossible but it is a pain in the ass
clem is just more versatile while not being any less powerful
That makes sense. So Saya is more for just blanket damage. Rather than a more combo oriented unit
